rationale: The cited paper is in the same core empirical domain as the citing study (weekly packaged-goods sales response and advertising elasticity), so it could plausibly be an important prior source rather than a purely incidental mention. However, the only match evidence is a single DOI reference entry with no in-text citation context, quotation, or described use in the citing note. With this limited evidence, it is not safe to drop but not strong enough to clearly keep.
